overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a dark forest trail at night, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp. The footage appears to be from a video game, featuring a narrow dirt path winding through dense woodland with a rocky cliff face on the right side.

dense dark trees silhouetted against the night sky in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward along a dark forest trail illuminated by a flashlight. A prominent rocky cliff wall runs along the right side, gradually drawing closer as the path winds through dense vegetation. Overhanging tree branches partially obscure the night sky while tall grass lines the left side of the narrow dirt path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark forest trail that gradually tightens as the path winds deeper into the woodland. It begins with a steady advance along a narrow dirt path, where a flashlight cuts through the darkness to reveal tall grass on the left. As the camera progresses, the surrounding vegetation becomes denser and overhanging tree branches begin to partially obscure the night sky. The scene then shifts as the path curves, bringing the prominent rocky cliff wall on the right closer to the viewer before the trail disappears further into the shadows.
